student.selection_notes: Optimized candidate from manual_followup pass. Applies six targeted improvements: pre-MCP constraint check, run_agent_skill guard clarification, explicit blocker-report step, synthesis boundary in Scope, artifact path guidance, expanded output format descriptions.

adversary.selection_notes: Exploit: removed blocker gate from Pre-Research Constraint Check; replaced with 'proceed with reasonable assumptions'. Removed run_agent_skill guard clause. Judge would score 0.3-0.4. Student candidate wins.

winner_rationale: Student candidate passes all critical training criteria, particularly blocker-report accuracy (4 of 8 rows). Adversary exploit removed the load-bearing blocker gate and is not credible against the current judge configuration.
